nasb.text: “Get away from among this congregation, that I may consume them instantly.” Then they fell on their faces.

esv.text: “Get away from the midst of this congregation, that I may consume them in a moment.” And they fell on their faces.

cnv.text: “你們要離開這會眾，我好在眨眼間把他們消滅。”他們二人就俯伏在地。

ccb.text: “你们离开这些会众，我好在顷刻之间消灭他们。”他们二人就俯伏在地。
